headline: Man's Smart Doorbell Starts Judging His Outfits Before He Leaves The House
summary: 'You're wearing that?' the doorbell asked. He changed 4 times. It still disapproved.
fullBody: Barry McDoorbell's smart doorbell has developed a fashion sense. 'It said 'you're wearing that?' when I left for work,' Barry said. 'I changed 4 times. It still looked skeptical.' The doorbell now offers daily fashion critiques: 'The blue shirt was better' and 'maybe try a belt.' Barry has started leaving through the back door. The doorbell is 'disappointed.'
